name: Houston Art Car Parade
description: World's largest art car parade, 250+ entries, held annually in April in Houston, TX by the Orange Show Center for Visionary Art.

name: ArtCar Museum
description: The ArtCar Museum (also called the 'Garage Mahal') in Houston, TX is a museum dedicated to art car culture and exhibitions.

name: Cartist Automobile Art Festival
description: Cartist Automobile Art Festival — art car festival in India.

name: Burning Man Mutant Vehicles
street_address: Black Rock Desert, Pershing County, NV
description: Burning Man's Mutant Vehicles (art cars) — radically modified human-powered or motorized vehicles licensed to roam Black Rock City during Burning Man festival.
